segments.text: Right, the spacing is getting even further away than usual
segments.original_text: なるほど普段の間合いとはまた一段遠くなってくる

segments.text: Normally that would be avoided, but not now
segments.original_text: 普段だったら避けられてますからね今の

segments.text: And there's a difference in KO percent
segments.original_text: さあバーストのパーセンテージの差がある

full_text: Right, the spacing is getting even further away than usual Normally that would be avoided, but not now And there's a difference in KO percent Jack That's a guaranteed punish!

corrections.corrected: バーストのパーセンテージ
